title: Topeedy 43 * 58cm Extra Large Xmas Gift Wrapping Bag,3pcs Silver Christmas Goody Drawstring Bag for Christmas Party Present
features: 🎄【Silver Christmas Bag】You will receive 3pcs 43*58cm silver Christmas drawstring bags.
✨【Attractive design】Different Kinds of Christmas Wrapping Bags！This silver Christmas gift bag is attractive , and the whole bag shines in the light!

🎊【Durable and resuable】We use premium quality raw materials-aluminum foil and exquisite printing technology. This Christmas drawstring gift bag is waterproof, easy to clean, non-irritating and durable enough to be reused.

🎅【Wide application】These exquisite drawstring bags are very suitable for packing Christmas gifts, such as candy, cookies, toys, books and so on.Using this gift bag to wrap gifts will be loved and praised by many people.
🎁【Service】If you have any problems about the product, please feel free to contact us.
